mapper.sql: id, game_date, game_time, away_team, home_team, away_score, home_score, status, stadium, notes, created_at, updated_at
mapper.select: SELECT FROM game WHERE game_date BETWEEN #{start} AND #{end} ORDER BY game_date, game_time
SELECT FROM game WHERE game_date = #{date} ORDER BY game_time
SELECT FROM game WHERE game_date BETWEEN #{start} AND #{end} AND (away_team = #{team} OR home_team = #{team}) ORDER BY game_date, game_time
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM game WHERE status = #{status}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO game (game_date, game_time, away_team, home_team, away_score, home_score, status, stadium, notes) VALUES (#{gameDate}, #{gameTime}, #{awayTeam}, #{homeTeam}, #{awayScore}, #{homeScore}, #{status, typeHandler=org.apache.ibatis.type.EnumTypeHandler}, #{stadium}, #{notes}) ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE game_time = VALUES(game_time), away_score = VALUES(away_score), home_score = VALUES(home_score), status = VALUES(status), stadium = VALUES(stadium), notes = VALUES(notes), updated_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP
